Professional League: FUS Rabat Snatch Late Draw Against Ittihad Tanger (1-1)
T.E (Elbotola)
06 May 2026at17:59

FUS Rabat secured a 1-1 draw against their visitors Ittihad Tanger in a match held as part of the 19th round of the Botola Pro League.

Ittihad Tanger opened the scoring in the 16th minute through Zakaria El Kiani at the Prince Moulay El Hassan Stadium in Rabat. However, Salaheddine Benyachou netted a crucial equalizer for FUS Rabat in the dying moments of the game (87th minute).

New York City FC vs. Los Angeles Football Club Rescheduled for November 4

New York City FC today announced that their match against Los Angeles Football Club has been rescheduled due to LAFC’s progression to the Concacaf Champions Cup semifinals. The match will now be played on Wednesday, November 4 at 7:30pm ET at Citi Field.

Pending MLB playoffs, the match could be moved forward to Saturday, October 17. Should that occu
